channel.description: Food photography from a Williamsburg apartment — natural light, earth tones, textured surfaces. Tutorials, tethered-shooting walkthroughs, Lightroom and Capture One workflows, and behind-the-scenes from restaurant and cookbook shoots. New uploads most months.
channel.keywords: food photography natural light lightroom capture one sony a7iv styling tethered brooklyn
channel.title: Jesse Page Photography
